ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* The team that won the championship in that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, shooting guard) */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the team plays their home games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game was played in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player in the season */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total number of field goals made by the player in the season */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of field goals attempted by the player in the season */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total number of three-pointers made by the player in the season */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of three-pointers attempted by the player in the season */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total number of free throws made by the player in the season */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of free throws attempted by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists by the player in the season */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total number of steals by the player in the season */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks by the player in the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total number of turnovers by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the team in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the team in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the team in the game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the team in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the team in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the team in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the team in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the team in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the team in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in the season */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total number of field goals made by the team in the season */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of field goals attempted by the team in the season */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total number of three-pointers made by the team in the season */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of three-pointers attempted by the team in the season */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total number of free throws made by the team in the season */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of free throws attempted by the team in the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds by the team in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists by the team in the season */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total number of steals by the team in the season */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks by the team in the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total number of turnovers by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
